blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,023 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 37°F.
Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 30°F, winds around 23 mph. Expect variable conditions.
